corrections.text: Two of the five cited sources could not be captured to the provenance snapshot chain: the California High-Speed Rail Authority release (hsr.ca.gov) returned an Incapsula bot-block page and PBS News returned an AWS WAF challenge page, despite both responding with success HTTP status codes. The article's claims attributed to those two sources were independently verified during review: the Authority's headline, lead, the Ian Choudri CEO quote, and the 119-mile / 220-mph / structures / jobs figures are confirmed verbatim in the full-content Metro Magazine source, and the Trump quote, Authority spokesperson quote, $4 billion July 2025 federal withdrawal, dropped lawsuit, and 'more than $100 billion' total cost were confirmed against the live PBS article.
